athlete_id.description: Target athlete; defaults to selected athlete in coach mode, or the only athlete otherwise. Format: i12345 or 12345.

custom_fields.description: Optional athlete-defined activity custom field codes to fetch for custom:<field> correlation metrics; defaults to none.

include_full.description: When true, include paired samples; terse mode omits raw rows.

lag_days.description: Positive lag pairs x on D with y on D+lag.

metric_x.description: X metric. Use a canonical analysis_metric enum value or custom:<field_code> when that code is also listed in custom_fields.

metric_y.description: Y metric. Use a canonical analysis_metric enum value or custom:<field_code> when that code is also listed in custom_fields.

sport.description: Optional sport/category filter for activity-backed metrics.

window.description: Inclusive athlete-local anchor window for metric_x.
